items.name: Webdev Next/Tailwind/shadcn Project Template
items.author: webdev
items.sourceNotes: Original scaffold assembled for webdev. No Open Design source, prompts, templates, generated examples, assets, or UX copy copied. Third-party runtime packages are declared in package.json and remain under their own licenses.

cleanRoom.reviewNotes: Template is webdev-authored around common Next.js, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui conventions. It does not copy Open Design materials or named brand design systems.

thirdParty.name: Next.js
thirdParty.usage: Template runtime dependency declared in package.json.

thirdParty.name: React
thirdParty.usage: Template runtime dependency declared in package.json.

thirdParty.name: Tailwind CSS
thirdParty.usage: Template styling dependency declared in package.json.

thirdParty.name: shadcn/ui conventions
thirdParty.license: MIT components when copied from the upstream registry; local component files must be reviewed before paid distribution.
thirdParty.usage: Component API and utility conventions used by the generated project scaffold.
